info.name: Chondathan Freebooter
info.description: The Chondathan Freebooter background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Skill Proficiencies: Athletics and Sleight of Hand
Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Dagger, Weaver’s Tools, Backpack, Ball Bearings, Basket, Bedroll, Bucket, Rations (3 days’ worth), Rope, Signal Whistle, Traveler’s Clothes, 38 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: Though most youths in Chondath accept their four-year term of compulsory military service, you bristled at that authoritarian attempt to control your life. You forsook your nationhood, discarded your given name, and worked as a freebooter with the first ship that would have you. Since then, you’ve traveled the Vilhon Reach . Though you’ve never sailed more than a few dozen leagues from land, you make up for it with deep local connections and the breadth of your experiences.

setters.set: Strength, Dexterity, Wisdom, Skilled Feat, Athletics and Sleight of Hand Skills, and Weaver’s Tools
